prevalence.source: Indian IBD registry and gastroenterology syntheses
prevalence.trend: increasing with urbanization and improved diagnosis

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to chronic disability and complications

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms plus endoscopy with biopsy; imaging for extent; exclude infections (TB, enteric pathogens)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; biologic access limited by cost

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Colonoscopy and imaging available in tertiary centers; delays in diagnosis due to infection overlap
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Steroids for flares, immunomodulators, biologics in select cases; surgery for complications
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cost of biologics, TB differentiation, limited specialist access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing IBD centers and awareness in major cities
